title: Hexwoven
description: A Hex Casting based modpack (Previously Hex Creator)
body:
## Note:
**While Modrinth pack files will continue to be supported, if you want a version that automatically updates download `Hexwoven.zip` from [my git releases](https://git.tw25.net/teal-wolf-25/Hexwoven/releases). The automatically updating version does not support the Modrinth, CurseForge or Vanilla launchers but should support every other launcher**

A modpack focusing on Hex Casting and Hex Casting addons. There are some other mods to help bind it together though.

**Features**
- Use steampunk technology to automate farms
- Use magic to change how you play the game
- Play music on instruments

**Minimum RAM**
6GiB (6144 MiB)

**Server Address**
[hex.tw25.net](https://modrinth.com/project/hexwoven-server)
